name: Nora Mill Buttermilk Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cup NORA MILL buttermilk cornbread mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg until light.
2. Add the buttermilk and shortening to the egg mixture.
3. Mix together, then add the NORA MILL cornbread mix. Blend until lumps are gone.
4. Pour into a well-greased pan.
5. Bake at 450 degrees F for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
